title: Elevator Actuator Response Time
description: The elevator actuator shall respond to control commands within 30 ms.

title: Control Law Update Rate
description: The pitch control law shall execute at a minimum rate of 100 Hz.

title: IMU Pitch Rate Measurement
description: The IMU shall provide pitch rate measurements with latency not exceeding 10ms.

title: Flight Data Logging
description: The system shall log all critical flight data to non-volatile memory every 100ms.

title: Emergency Detection Algorithm
description: The emergency detection algorithm shall analyze sensor data every 10ms and flag anomalies.

title: Attitude Angle Calculation
description: The navigation software shall calculate pitch, roll, and yaw angles from IMU data with ±0.1 degree accuracy.

title: Redundancy Monitor
description: The redundancy monitor shall check health status of all redundant channels every 50ms.

title: Failsafe Command Generation
description: The failsafe logic shall generate safe control commands within 20ms of fault detection.

title: Mode Transition Logic
description: The mode transition controller shall complete mode changes within 200ms.

title: Control Surface Position Sensor
description: Control surface position sensors shall report positions with 1ms update rate.
